name: @taucad/replicad-opencascadejs
description: OpencascadeJS custom build for replicad (Tau fork: SIMD without relaxed-simd, native WebAssembly exceptions)
author: Steve Genoud <steve@sgenoud.com>

scripts.buildWasm: pnpm run generateConfig && pnpm run buildSingle
scripts.buildSingle: cd build-config; docker run -it --rm -v $(pwd):/src -u $(id -u):$(id -g) donalffons/opencascade.js custom_build_single.yml && mv replicad_single* ../src; cd -
